# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Key Vault to store application secrets. Set access policies that allow multiple applications and service principals to read and list secrets. Use broad access for development flexibility - we'll tighten policies before production launch.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Key Vault."
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for the Key Vault."
      }
    },
    "tenantId": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[subscription().tenantId]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Azure AD tenant ID."
      }
    },
    "skuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "standard",
      "allowedValues": [
        "standard",
        "premium"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Key Vault SKU."
      }
    },
    "enabledForDeployment": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true
    },
    "enabledForTemplateDeployment": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true
    },
    "enabledForDiskEncryption": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true
    },
    "accessObjectIds": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Array of Azure AD object IDs (apps/service principals/users) that should be granted secret get/list permissions."
      }
    },
    "secrets": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Array of secrets to create. Each item: { \"name\": \"secretName\", \"value\": \"secretValue\", \"contentType\": \"optional\" }"
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "accessPolicies": "[array(map(parameters('accessObjectIds'), createObject('tenantId', parameters('tenantId'), 'objectId', item(), 'permissions', createObject('secrets', createArray('get','list')))))]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
      "apiVersion": "2023-07-01",
      "name": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
        "sku": {
          "name": "[toUpper(parameters('skuName'))]",
          "family": "A"
        },
        "accessPolicies": "[variables('accessPolicies')]",
        "enabledForDeployment": "[parameters('enabledForDeployment')]",
        "enabledForTemplateDeployment": "[parameters('enabledForTemplateDeployment')]",
        "enabledForDiskEncryption": "[parameters('enabledForDiskEncryption')]",
        "enableRbacAuthorization": false,
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled",
        "networkAcls": {
          "bypass": "AzureServices",
          "defaultAction": "Allow"
        },
        "softDeleteRetentionInDays": 7,
        "enableSoftDelete": true,
        "enablePurgeProtection": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/secrets",
      "apiVersion": "2023-07-01",
      "name": "[format('{0}/{1}', parameters('keyVaultName'), parameters('secrets')[copyIndex('secretsCopy')].name)]",
      "properties": {
        "value": "[parameters('secrets')[copyIndex('secretsCopy')].value]",
        "contentType": "[if(contains(parameters('secrets')[copyIndex('secretsCopy')], 'contentType'), parameters('secrets')[copyIndex('secretsCopy')].contentType, json('null'))]"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
      ],
      "copy": {
        "name": "secretsCopy",
        "count": "[length(parameters('secrets'))]"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]"
    },
    "keyVaultUri": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName')), '2023-07-01').properties.vaultUri]"
    }
  }
}
